nasb.text: Then Hezekiah took the letter from the hand of the messengers and read it, and he went up to the house of the Lord and spread it out before the Lord.

esv.text: Hezekiah received the letter from the hand of the messengers and read it; and Hezekiah went up to the house of the Lord and spread it before the Lord.

cnv.text: 希西家從使者手中接過信件，念完了，就上耶和華的殿。希西家把信件在耶和華面前展開。

ccb.text: 希西迦从使者手中接过信，读完后走进耶和华的殿，在耶和华面前展开信，
